name: Cesar Chavez Pawn & Jewelry
description_short: Cesar Chavez Pawn & Jewelry buys, sells, and lends against gold, jewelry, and valuables in Los Angeles with same-day appraisals and fast cash.
description_long:
Cesar Chavez Pawn & Jewelry is a traditional pawn shop located at 2209 E. Cesar E. Chavez Ave. in Los Angeles, CA 90033. The business operates during extended hours (Mon-Sat 9am-6pm, Sun 10am-4pm) and positions itself as a customer-friendly alternative to traditional lending, comparing their service to "getting a loan from your uncle with a little interest."

The company offers a full range of pawn shop services including buying items outright, selling merchandise, providing professional appraisals, offering collateral-based loan services, and operating a layaway program. Their primary focus appears to be gold and jewelry transactions, as indicated by their business name and website branding. Customers can bring items in for evaluation and receive fast cash offers on the spot.

Cesar Chavez Pawn & Jewelry distinguishes itself through emphasis on friendly customer service and stated commitment to having "customers' best interests in mind at all times." The business is locally established in Los Angeles with a direct phone line (323-268-GOLD) for customer inquiries. Their positioning suggests they serve customers who need immediate liquidity and prefer a personal relationship-based transaction model.

For consumers, this represents a collateral-based lending option outside the traditional banking system. The main consideration is that pawn loans carry interest costs and the risk of losing items if loans aren't repaid, making this best suited for short-term cash needs with items of genuine resale value. The business model is straightforward but consumers should understand pawn lending terms before engaging.
address: 2209 E Cesar E Chavez Ave, Los Angeles, CA 90033

company_info.headquarters: 2209 E Cesar E Chavez Ave, Los Angeles, CA 90033

pros: Same-day appraisals and fast cash available during business hours
Extended operating hours including Sunday service (10am-4pm)
Multiple service options: buy, sell, loan, appraise, and layaway program
Locally established business with direct phone contact (323-268-GOLD)
No credit check required for pawn loans, only collateral-based valuation
Straightforward transaction model without complex loan agreements
cons: Limited to collateral-based loans, not suitable for unsecured borrowing needs
Risk of losing items if pawn loans are not repaid by deadline
Interest costs apply to pawn loans, making this more expensive than traditional lending
Physical location limited to single Los Angeles address, no online lending option
Website provides minimal detail on loan terms, rates, or specific services offered
best_for: Customers needing immediate cash for gold, jewelry, or valuable items
People without access to traditional credit who need short-term loans
Individuals looking to sell unwanted jewelry or precious metals quickly
Consumers seeking a layaway option for high-value purchases
diagnosis: Cesar Chavez Pawn & Jewelry is best for customers with valuable items (gold, jewelry) who need immediate cash outside the traditional banking system. The main caveat is that pawn loans carry interest costs and the risk of forfeiture if not repaid, making this suitable only for short-term liquidity needs and items of real resale value.
services: Pawn loans against gold and jewelry
